items.caption_text: #AD This is Intel's AI Playground: Think of it as your complete creative studio - write copy, generate images, and upscale images all in one place. Powered by the new Intel® Core™ Ultra processors, everything happens right on your device, keeping your creative process seamless and secure.

items.caption_text:
#ad Remember when finding funny moments meant watching entire videos?

Now, we're using these AI features on Intel® Core™ Ultra AI PCs to instantly extract laughs from our two-hour podcast, maintaining perfect context in Premiere. 

This is what happens when AI meets serious processing power. Creators, your workflow just got an upgrade!

items.caption_text: #AD We've been playing against computer bots in chess for a while, but being able to create it on the fly on your laptop is a big deal. It's a testament to the fact that anybody can now create entry-level apps and games like this, which used to be way harder to do. And this is all happening on #IntelCoreUltra laptops, it is amazing how you can now code, create, and bring ideas to life on a single AI PC. #AIPC #AI

items.caption_text:
#AD We took Tanmay’s old 360p video and turned it into high-resolution HD with Topaz Video AI on Intel® Core™ Ultra laptops. From repurposing archival footage to restoring personal memories, the use cases for video editors and content creators are endless. And the fact that we did all of this on a laptop is impressive. Like, the new Intel® Core™ Ultra processors really make running intensive AI applications like this pretty seamless.

Plus, Topaz Labs is one of over 100 ISVs partnering with Intel to optimize their software for these AI capabilities. So, if you need a laptop with high performance and advanced AI features, explore the options available with Intel® Core™ Ultra processor-powered AI PCs. #IntelCoreUltra #AIPC #IntelAI #AI
